title: 4 Horsemen
wikitext:
[]: 4 Horsemen?             Quote Post by nitemare123 » Mon Nov 04, 2013 4:49 pm So I decided to read up on Revelations in the bible, not that im religious, but I just wanted to read it. It discuses the 4 Horsemen of the Apocalypse. Revelations, Chapter 6, Verse 1-8 1 And I saw when the Lamb opened one of the seals, and I heard, as it were the noise of thunder, one of the four beasts saying, Come and see. 2 And I saw, and behold a white horse: and he that sat on him had a bow; and a crown was given unto him: and he went forth conquering, and to conquer. 3 And when he had opened the second seal, I heard the second beast say, Come and see. 4 And there went out another horse that was red: and power was given to him that sat thereon to take peace from the earth, and that they should kill one another: and there was given unto him a great sword. 5 And when he had opened the third seal, I heard the third beast say, Come and see. And I beheld, and lo a black horse; and he that sat on him had a pair of balances in his hand. 6 And I heard a voice in the midst of the four beasts say, A measure of wheat for a penny, and three measures of barley for a penny; and see thou hurt not the oil and the wine. 7 And when he had opened the fourth seal, I heard the voice of the fourth beast say, Come and see. 8 And I looked, and behold a pale horse: and his name that sat on him was Death, and Hell followed with him. And power was given unto them over the fourth part of the earth, to kill with sword, and with hunger, and with death, and with the beasts of the earth.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Mon Nov 04, 2013 5:53 pm I've tried, hard , to map imagery from Eva to Revelations. There is sadly very little relationship between them. Judeo-Christian imagery is used often enough, but textual references to the Bible are few and far between. The only concrete one is the sea of blood around Antarctica or generally in Rebuild.

[]: Re: 4 Horsemen?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Nov 04, 2013 6:06 pm nitemare123 wrote: Kaworu = White Asuka = Red Shinji = Black Rei = Pale

[]: Re: 4 Horsemen?             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 04, 2013 6:51 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Rei and Kaworu are both albinos, so they have pale complexions.

[]: Re: 4 Horsemen?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Nov 04, 2013 7:06 pm Reichu wrote: people assume they're albinos (even though they probably aren't).

[]: Re: 4 Horsemen?             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 04, 2013 7:12 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: All I'm going to say on the matter is that Carl Horn felt strongly enough to include it in the dossiers section in volume 6 of the manga.

[]: Re: 4 Horsemen?             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Tue Nov 05, 2013 4:17 am Reichu wrote: It's more the other way around. They're designed with pale skin and red eyes so that they seem alien and creepy, and people assume they're albinos (even though they probably aren't).

[]: 4 Horsemen?             Quote Post by nitemare123 » Mon Nov 04, 2013 4:49 pm So I decided to read up on Revelations in the bible, not that im religious, but I just wanted to read it. It discuses the 4 Horsemen of the Apocalypse. Revelations, Chapter 6, Verse 1-8 1 And I saw when the Lamb opened one of the seals, and I heard, as it were the noise of thunder, one of the four beasts saying, Come and see. 2 And I saw, and behold a white horse: and he that sat on him had a bow; and a crown was given unto him: and he went forth conquering, and to conquer. 3 And when he had opened the second seal, I heard the second beast say, Come and see. 4 And there went out another horse that was red: and power was given to him that sat thereon to take peace from the earth, and that they should kill one another: and there was given unto him a great sword. 5 And when he had opened the third seal, I heard the third beast say, Come and see. And I beheld, and lo a black horse; and he that sat on him had a pair of balances in his hand. 6 And I heard a voice in the midst of the four beasts say, A measure of wheat for a penny, and three measures of barley for a penny; and see thou hurt not the oil and the wine. 7 And when he had opened the fourth seal, I heard the voice of the fourth beast say, Come and see. 8 And I looked, and behold a pale horse: and his name that sat on him was Death, and Hell followed with him. And power was given unto them over the fourth part of the earth, to kill with sword, and with hunger, and with death, and with the beasts of the earth.
